title: Human–AI screening
tagline: Screen a paper for eligibility in a human–AI collaboration meta-analysis (pre-registered inclusion/exclusion criteria) — one verdict per paper.
description: Applicability screening for a human–AI collaboration meta-analysis. Returns one verdict per paper: whether it is an original human–AI collaboration experiment that reports human-alone, AI-alone, AND human–AI performance quantitatively, includes the experimental design, per-condition N, and per-condition SD (or enough to compute it), is in English, and is not a review/meta-analysis/theoretical/qualitative/commentary/opinion/simulation. Each criterion is answered with verbatim evidence, and an overall Eligible = Yes/No decision with the failing reasons.
task_description: Screen a paper against the pre-registered human–AI collaboration inclusion/exclusion criteria and return one eligibility verdict with per-criterion answers and evidence.
context: Applicability screening step that runs BEFORE data extraction: decide whether a paper fits the meta-analysis before pulling its numbers with the Human–AI collaboration extractor.
